configurations.name: Serverless Local Emulators
configurations.command: zsh -lc 'source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 20 && java_major=$(java -version 2>&1 | sed -nE "1s/.*version \"([0-9]+).*/\1/p") && [ -n "$java_major" ] || { echo "Java runtime not found. Install Java 21+ to run the Firestore emulator."; exit 1; }; [ "$java_major" -ge 21 ] || { echo "Java 21+ is required to run the Firestore emulator with the current firebase-tools version."; exit 1; }; firebase emulators:start --import=./emulator-data --export-on-exit=./emulator-data'
